subject.description: An exhausted, stressed business owner in their late 30s.
subject.action: Scrolling slowly on their smartphone, looking exhausted by the content. Faintly reflected in their glasses (or blurred in the dark background) is a chaotic collage of generic, overly-colorful, clearly AI-generated illustrations.

setting.location: A dark, quiet home office or living room late at night.

composition.framing: Rule of thirds, centered. MUST follow cropping rules: never cut in flesh, leave headspace (no cutting top of head), cut above eyebrows for close-ups, and always give the chin breathing room. Focusing heavily on the tired eyes.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Low depth of field, strictly focusing on the human face, blurring the AI elements in the background.

lighting.type: Soft glowing light from the smartphone screen illuminating out of the darkness.
lighting.color_grading: Cool screen tones, dark, cinematic, realistic contrast.

negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear in the image: text, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, artificial studio lighting, unnatural skin, cut off heads, cut off chins, weird cropping.
